notes: Cold/ice specialist Unique base — one instance on the map, sited on Plains, no terrain exception. Frostworks builds a SUBSET of the Heavy Tank roster (Frost Tank, Juggernaut, Rocket Tank) — not Granite Crumbler (also built at Scrapyard's Salvage Works) or Chonky, which stays Fort Irongrad-exclusive. Cold Turret is the specialty defense (ice bombs, freezes on hit). Ice Spire is pre-seeded/fixed (isFixed: true on data/buildings/ice_spire.json) — a pure aura structure slowing nearby enemy troops, not a production or defensive building; it can never be freshly built even after capture, only rebuilt from a ruin. +50% Oil Rig bonus is a building-scoped resourceModifiers entry (multiplier 1.5), authored on this BaseDef rather than as an Ice Spire aura.
